name: saxotrader
description: Live prices, instrument lookup, and portfolio data from your Saxo Bank account — directly in Claude. Read-only, no order placement. v1.1.0 · github.com/zaliori-io/claude-marketplace · hello@zaliori.com · Requires your own Saxo account and app registration. MIT-licensed, not affiliated with Saxo Bank A/S.
prompts: What's the live price of ASML?
Find all exchanges where Wheaton Precious Metals trades
What's the bid/ask spread on the iShares gold ETC?
Look up the Saxo UIC for Apple
